message:
fix(test): correct swapped wheel scroll direction names in input.rs tests

wheel_scroll_down_emits_sgr_code_64 → wheel_scroll_up_negative_dy_emits_sgr_code_64
wheel_scroll_up_emits_sgr_code_65 → wheel_scroll_down_positive_dy_emits_sgr_code_65

dy < 0 is scroll-up (web convention), mapping to xterm code 64 (button 4).
dy > 0 is scroll-down (web convention), mapping to xterm code 65 (button 5).

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
